title: pelargonium × sophiae
intro: Pelargonium × sophiae, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium graveolens and Pelargonium tomentosum. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × sophiae include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
